During the assessment we observed the following request:

GET /oauth/callback?code=synthetic-auth-code&state=synthetic-state-value&token=synthetic-query-token HTTP/1.1
Host: callback.example.test
Authorization: Bearer synthetic-bearer-token
Cookie: session=<REDACTED:cookie.value>; theme=dark
X-API-Key: synthetic-api-key

The token parameter above is interesting. Also note:
https://example.test/?sig=<REDACTED:query.secret>&signature=synthetic-signature
